title: lastrea strigosa
intro: Lastrea strigosa, also known as the striped fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lastrea strigosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Lastrea strigosa include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
